content:
{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
[[File:Battle_for_the_Golden_Sun.jpg|thumb|200px|''[[Battle for the Golden Sun]]'' released in 1988.]]

A list of events in '''1988''' related to ''Star Wars''.

==January==
*[[January 28|28]] – [[Pierce Brown]] is born.
*?? – [[Elliot Hawkes]] is born.

==February==
*[[February 10|10]] – [[Daniel Kwan]] is born.

==April==
[[File:AmeeBraces-TPM.png|thumb|right|180px|[[Katie Lucas]] was born on [[April 13]], 1988]]
*[[April 13|13]] – [[Katie Lucas]] is born.
*[[April 18|18]] – Nickelodeon Kids' Choice Awards premiered on Nickelodeon.
*[[April 29|29]] – [[Mark Stanley]] is born.

==May==
*[[May 14|14]] – [[Charlie Bowater]] is born.
*?? – The ''[[Star Wars Campaign Pack]]'', a supplement for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'', is published by [[West End Games]].

==July==
*?? – ''[[Tatooine Manhunt]]'', an adventure scenario for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'', is published by [[West End Games]].
*[[July 11|11]] – [[Dhruv Chanchani]] is born.
*[[July 19|19]] – [[Cherami Leigh]] is born.
*[[July 27|27]] – [[Chelsea Hamill]] is born.

==August==
*[[August 20|20]] – [[Nikki SooHoo]] is born.
*?? – ''[[Strike Force: Shantipole]]'', an adventure scenario for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'', is published by [[West End Games]].

==October==
*?? – ''[[Assault on Hoth]]'', a board game of the Imperial assault on the Rebel Alliance's Hoth Base, is published by [[West End Games]].
*?? – The ''[[Lightsaber Dueling Pack]]'', a flipbook game, is published by [[West End Games]].
*[[October 23|23]] – [[Ritesh Rajan]] is born.

==November==
*[[November 10|10]] – [[Sam Maggs]] is born.
*?? – ''[[Battle for the Golden Sun]]'', an adventure scenario for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'', is published by [[West End Games]].

==Unknown month==
*?? – [[Daniel Fleetwood]] is born.
*?? – [[Oliver Walpole]] is born.
*?? – [[Star Wars 3-D 2|''Star Wars 3-D'' 2]] published.
*?? – [[Star Wars 3-D 3|''Star Wars 3-D'' 3]] published.
*?? – ''[[Star Wars: Droids (video game)]]'' released.
*?? – [[The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine 2|''The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'' 2]] published in Winter.
*?? – [[The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine 3|''The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'' 3]] published in Spring.
*?? – [[The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine 4|''The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'' 4]] published in Summer.
*?? – [[The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine 5|''The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'' 5]] published in Fall.

----
